name: Basil Jicama Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cantaloupe, honeydew or mango - cubed
1/2 cup Jicama, peeled, cut into matchstick pieces
1 tablespoon Basil, fresh, chopped OR 1 teaspoon Basil, dried, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, combine all ingredients except basil sprigs.
2. Mix gently.
3. To serve, garnish with a sprig of basil.
